creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Leonid Nevecherya from comment #0)

Hello Leonid,

Thank you for patch. But there is milter build problem in 0.102.0.

https://lists.clamav.net/pipermail/clamav-users/2019-October/008624.html
https://lists.clamav.net/pipermail/clamav-users/2019-October/008626.html

So I would like to skip this release and wait for 0.102.1.
